source.jobDescriptionText: RevHub Growth needs an agency engagement to sharpen positioning, identify account opportunities, and define a sales-to-marketing motion.
notes: The intake suggests account-based work and leadership reporting.
The brief appears to be performance-oriented.

normalized.decisionToSupport: Whether the client should advance the agency engagement.
normalized.sourceSummary: Agency intake focused on positioning, account opportunities, and measurable commercial motion.

missingInformation.question: Which channels are currently in play?

followUpQuestions: What revenue outcome is the agency engagement expected to support?
Which segments or accounts are highest priority?
